user.title: IPBuilding Gateway
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of the IPBuilding Gateway. The default host (127.0.0.1) is correct for the Supervisor add-on; change it for standalone Docker or remote installs.

confirm.title: IPBuilding Gateway found
confirm.description: The {addon} gateway v{version} is reachable at {url}. Give it a name to recognise this gateway among others, or leave the default.

error.gateway_unreachable: Could not reach the gateway at {host}:{port}. Is it running?
error.connection_refused: Connection refused — is the gateway running?

abort.invalid_discovery_info: The discovery payload was incomplete or malformed.
abort.not_ipbuilding_gateway_addon: This Supervisor add-on is not the IPBuilding Gateway.

map_rooms.title: Assign IPBuilding groups to Home Assistant areas
map_rooms.description: Assign {room_count} group(s) from your IPBuilding installation to Home Assistant areas. Leave empty to create an area with the same name.

dim_start.name: Start dim ramp
dim_start.description: Start a continuous hold-to-dim ramp on a dimmer channel. Sends D<ch>001003 to the IP0300PoE; the module ramps and auto-reverses direction on each successive hold. Pair with the stop service to halt the ramp.

target.name: Light entity
target.description: The companion light entity backed by an IP0300PoE dimmer channel.

dim_stop.name: Stop dim ramp
dim_stop.description: Stop a dim ramp started by the dim_start service. Sends D<ch>001000; the dimmer replies with the level reached when the stop landed.

target.name: Light entity
target.description: The companion light entity backed by an IP0300PoE dimmer channel.
